extension.description: Send plain-text emails from VS Code via Gmail SMTP — compose in the sidebar or command palette, no browser needed.
activitybar.title: Send Email
view.name: Send Email
command.sendEmail.title: Send Email
config.title: Send Email
config.smtpUser.description: Gmail address used to send emails
config.smtpPassword.description: Gmail app password — generate one at https://myaccount.google.com/apppasswords under App passwords (requires 2-Step Verification)
config.fromAddress.description: Display name or address shown in the From field (defaults to smtpUser if empty)
view.inbox.name: Inbox
command.refreshInbox.title: Refresh Inbox
command.openInboxEmail.title: Open Email
